identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a 'Digital Noir' aesthetic that blends high-tech precision with the organic warmth of Guadeloupe.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. Tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all body text, UI elements, and data.

mono.usage: Use for small labels, KPIs, and technical details.

visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) to the main background to kill the 'digital flatness'.

marketing.rules: Never fill 100%. Use col-span-7 vs col-span-5 asymmetry.

dashboard.rules: Dense. No gaps > 16px. Use h-full for all children.

buttons.primary: bg-[#6A0F1A] text-white hover:bg-[#8B1422] rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-[#6A0F1A] hover:text-[#6A0F1A] bg-transparent rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold px-8 py-4

cards.marketing: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:border-[#6A0F1A]/50 transition-colors duration-500 p-8 rounded-sm

motion.micro: Buttons should have a magnetic pull or a subtle scale (0.98) on click.

hero_bg.desc: Guadeloupe Aerial - Darken this by 70% and use as hero background

team_meeting.desc: Modern team working - Use for 'L'Agence' section

tech_abstract.desc: 3D Abstract Red/Black - Use for 'Expertises' background or cards

guadeloupe_nature.desc: Guadeloupe Mountains - Use for 'Contact' section background (darkened)

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'lenis' for smooth scrolling immediately.
2. THEME: Force DARK MODE as default. The brand is 'Digital Noir'.
3. LAYOUT: Do not use standard Bootstrap containers. Use the 'Tetris Grid' for the landing page.
4. NAV: Create a floating glass navbar. It should NOT be full width. It should be a pill or a compact bar centered or right-aligned.
5. DASHBOARD: Keep it strictly functional. High contrast. No decorative gradients in the dashboard, only in the marketing site.
6. LOGO: Create a text-based logo using the 'Syne' font with a large 'A' in #6A0F1A if no SVG is available.
7. SHADCN: Customize all Shadcn components to remove the 'default Vercel look'. Set rounded-radius to '0.25rem' or '0' for a sharper look.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts.
Dark colors must be solid or subtle noise, NO muddy gradients.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical (p-12, p-24).
All interactive elements must have data-testid.
Never use emoji icons. Use Lucide React icons.
